chapter_title.en: Chapter on Currency Exchange and Its Forms

text: 4036 - رُوِيَ عَنْ عَمَّارٍ السَّابَاطِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ‌ قُلْتُ لَهُ الرَّجُلُ‌ يَبِيعُ الدَّرَاهِمَ بِالدَّنَانِيرِ نَسِيئَةً قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِهِ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4036 - It is narrated from Ammar al-Sabati, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
I asked him about a man who sells dirhams for dinars on credit.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in it."
